quests.title: Total Payin Target - 1000
quests.description: Complete total payin of 1000 to earn rewards. Track all your approved payin transactions to reach this milestone.

quests.title: Buy Basic Package
quests.description: Purchase the Basic Package to complete this quest and earn rewards.

quests.title: Buy Standard or Premium Package
quests.description: Purchase either the Standard or Premium Package to complete this quest. You only need to buy one of them.

quests.title: Total Package Hours - 200
quests.description: Accumulate a total of 200 hours across all your purchased packages to complete this quest.

quests.title: Referral Count - 5 Direct Referrals
quests.description: Refer 5 users who register with your referral code to complete this quest.

quests.title: Unilevel Commission - 5000 Total
quests.description: Earn a total of 5000 from unilevel commissions to complete this quest.

quests.title: Direct Bonus - 1000 Total
quests.description: Earn a total of 1000 from direct referral bonuses to complete this quest.
